title: micropholis curvata
intro: Micropholis curvata is a type of plant species, also known as the Guianese white mangrove, that belongs to the family Sapotaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Micropholis curvata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Micropholis curvata can be made by extracting its bark or leaves, and are often used in the form of teas, infusions, or poultices.
